items.name: 屯田兵屋
items.location: 北見市公園町1番地北網圏北見文化センター
items.description: 北見市指定文化財第1号。明治30年から31年にかけて、屯田兵の各戸主に与えられた屯田兵屋。

en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of a tonden colonist soldier's house. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Kitami City, located at the Hokumoken Kitami Cultural Center, Koen-cho 1, Kitami City.

items.name: 屯田兵人形
items.location: 北見市川東412番地信善光寺
items.description: 北見市指定文化財第2号。人形は全75体あり、全て実在の屯田兵をモデルにしている。

en.description_en: This is a folk cultural property consisting of a doll depicting a tonden colonist soldier. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Kitami City, located at Shinzenkoji Temple, Kawahigashi 412, Kitami City.

items.name: ピーボディ・マルチニー銃
items.location: 北見市公園町1番地北網圏北見文化センター
items.description: 北見市指定文化財第3号。プロビデンス兵器会社（アメリカ合衆国）製で、昭和44年に北見市青葉町で発見された。

en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of a Peabody-Martini rifle. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Kitami City, located at the Hokumoken Kitami Cultural Center, Koen-cho 1, Kitami City.

items.name: 広郷遺跡の出土遺物
items.location: 北見市公園町1番地北網圏北見文化センター
items.description: 北見市指定文化財第4号。旧石器時代終末期（約1万年前）。広郷型細石刃・広郷型細石刃核と呼称される。

en.name_en: Artifacts Excavated from the Hirosato Site
en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of artifacts excavated from the Hirosato site. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Kitami City, located at the Hokumoken Kitami Cultural Center, Koen-cho 1, Kitami City.

items.name: 中ノ島遺跡の出土遺物
items.location: 北見市公園町1番地北網圏北見文化センター
items.description: 北見市指定文化財第5号。縄文早期からアイヌ期にかけての複合遺跡。縄文晩期末に編年される土器群。

en.name_en: Artifacts Excavated from the Nakanoshima Site
en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of artifacts excavated from the Nakanoshima site. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Kitami City, located at the Hokumoken Kitami Cultural Center, Koen-cho 1, Kitami City.

items.name: 北進遺跡の出土遺物
items.location: 北見市公園町1番地北網圏北見文化センター
items.description: 北見市指定文化財第6号。旧石器時代終末期（約1万3千年前）。峠下型細石刃石核・荒屋型彫器を中心とする石器組成。

en.name_en: Artifacts Excavated from the Hokushin Site
en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of artifacts excavated from the Hokushin site. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Kitami City, located at the Hokumoken Kitami Cultural Center, Koen-cho 1, Kitami City.

items.name: 鎖塚の区域
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.location: 北見市端野町緋牛内842番地8
items.description: 北見市指定文化財第7号。中央道路開削に動員され斃死した囚人が埋葬されたと言われている区域。3基の土饅頭、供養碑、六地蔵等がある。

en.description_en: This is a monument (historic site) consisting of the area of the Kusarizuka mound. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Kitami City, located at Higoushinai 842-8, Tanno-cho, Kitami City.

items.name: 旧野付牛屯田第四大隊第一中隊本部被服糧秣庫
items.location: 北見市端野町一区649番地8
items.description: 北見市指定文化財第8号。明治29年建造。市内に残る唯一の屯田兵関連の公的建築物。現在も一区神社拝殿として使用。

en.name_romaji: Kyū Notsukeushi Tonden Dai-yon Daitai Dai-ichi Chūtai Honbu Hifuku Ryōmatsuko
en.name_en: Former Clothing and Provisions Storehouse of the Notsukeushi Tonden 4th Battalion 1st Company Headquarters
en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of the former clothing and provisions storehouse of the headquarters of the Notsukeushi tonden 4th Battalion 1st Company. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Kitami City, located at Ichiku 649-8, Tanno-cho, Kitami City.

items.name: 緋牛内の大カシワ
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.location: 北見市端野町緋牛内780番地8
items.description: 北見市指定文化財第9号。幹周は約5メートル。株立ちが1本のものでは全国一。樹齢300～350年以上と推定。

en.description_en: This is a monument (natural monument) consisting of the great oak (kashiwa) of Higoushinai. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Kitami City, located at Higoushinai 780-8, Tanno-cho, Kitami City.

items.name: ピアソン記念館
items.description: 北見市指定文化財第10号。大正3年、ピアソン宣教師夫妻の住宅として建設。設計はW.M.ヴォーリズ氏。

en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of the Pierson Memorial Hall. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Kitami City, located at Saiwai-cho 7-chome 4-28, Kitami City.

items.name: 北見ハッカ記念館
items.location: 北見市南仲町1丁目7番28号
items.description: 北見市指定文化財第11号。昭和9年、北聯北見薄荷工場の事務所兼研究室として建築。ハーフテンバースタイルの洋風建築。

en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of the Kitami Mint (Hakka) Memorial Hall. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Kitami City, located at Minaminaka-cho 1-chome 7-28, Kitami City.

items.name: 武華駅逓
items.location: 北見市留辺蘂町滝の湯127番地
items.description: 北見市指定文化財第12号。大正9年、官設駅逓として改札された。保存良好な代表的北海道駅逓建築物。

en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of the Muka post station. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Kitami City, located at Takinoyu 127, Rubeshibe-cho, Kitami City.

items.name: カタクリ及び周囲の北方性落葉広葉樹林
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 北見市指定文化財第13号。カタクリは日本のほぼ東限に分布。自家和合性を獲得。観察会の時のみ公開。

en.name_romaji: Katakuri Oyobi Shūi no Hoppōsei Rakuyō Kōyōjurin
en.name_en: Dogtooth Violets and Surrounding Northern Deciduous Broadleaf Forest
en.description_en: This is a monument (natural monument) consisting of dogtooth violets (katakuri) and the surrounding northern deciduous broadleaf forest. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Kitami City, located in Tanno-cho, Kitami City.
